title: OREGON MOTHERSCARE - 211info
text: JOSEPHINE COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH GRANTS PASS OREGON MOTHERSCARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides prenatal assessments to help all people begin prenatal care and connect to other resources in their communities. Services include pregnancy testing, OHP application assistance, and dental care referrals. Referrals are available for WIC, home visitation programs, and other prenatal support services. 715 NW Dimmick Street Grants Pass, OR 97526 Eligibility: Pregnant people Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-4:30pm Email (541) 474-5325 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 474-5325 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Call for information LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Josephine County SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 8am-noon and 1pm-5:45pm, Friday 8am-noon Closed 8am-noon on the first Tuesday of each month TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located on the corner of NW Dimmick and NW A Street Services: Dental Care Referrals * Pregnant Individuals Navigator Programs * Pregnant Individuals Physician Referrals * Pregnant Individuals Pregnancy Testing Specialized Information and Referral * Pregnant Individuals Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - SCREENWISE-ENROLLING HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - BABIES FIRST! PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - WOMEN, INFANTS, AND CHILDREN SUPPLEMENTAL NUTRITION PROGRAM PUBLIC HEALTH - COMMUNICABLE DISEASE PROGRAM SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - TUBERCULOSIS PROGRAM SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - VACCINES AND IMMUNIZATION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
